title: Sanctioned Russian Billionaire's $500M Superyacht Crosses Hormuz Despite US Naval Blockade
snippet: The 142-meter superyacht Nord, linked to sanctioned Russian billionaire Alexey Mordashov ($37B net worth, Severstal chairman), left Dubai Friday and arrived in Muscat, Oman Sunday after transiting the blockaded Strait of Hormuz. One of only a few private vessels to pass through since conflict began. Raises questions about blockade enforcement consistency and Russia's special treatment.
tag_reason: 러시아 억만장자 요트의 호르무즈 통과는 신규 사건. 이전 소스에 없음.
